name: Applesauce-Bran Breakfast Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease the bottom only of a 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large saucepan, heat the margarine and applesauce together over medium heat until the margarine is just melted. Remove from heat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, oat bran, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves) to the saucepan. Stir quickly to moisten everything together.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
